Home → Discography → Trials & Tribulations

Trials & Tribulations

2007 · Real Talk Entertainment

Released September 11, 2007 on Real Talk Entertainment/Koch Records, this was the retail-ready reworking of the same sessions behind Evolution of Elevation. Roughly half the tracks received new production from Vince V. and Big Hollis, while all song titles were changed and one additional track added. The album sits at the crossroads of street rap, gospel rap, and syncretic spirituality, with spiritual references shifting between Christian and Islamic frameworks.

"Rocks are bigger than boulders, Whether it's Colorado or if it's California"

— Explain to Me
01 Ride to This produced by Vince V ▷
02 Explain to Me produced by Vince V ▷
03 Let the Haters Know produced by Vince V ▷
04 You Don't Want It produced by Big Hollis feat. 7th Sign Regime ▷
05 The Block produced by Big Hollis ▷
06 Don't Ask Me Why produced by Vince V ▷
07 Lookin the Same produced by Big Hollis ▷
08 A Thugz Prayer ▷
09 Distant produced by Hella Tight feat. Aeileon El Niño ▷
10 I Don't Think You Know produced by Hella Tight feat. Aeileon El Niño ▷
11 Mr. Coke Man produced by Hella Tight ▷
12 Still Lookin the Same produced by Hella Tight feat. Tha Realest ▷
13 Don't Ask Me Why (Remix) produced by Hella Tight ▷
14 Trust & Believe produced by Vince V ▷
